description: Execute the Voxel adapter integration PRD: detect, read, register, test
prerequisites: Git repository is clean and committed
Current implementation passes all existing tests
WordPress site with Voxel plugin available for manual verification (optional for test phase)

strands.name: Backend: PHP Plugin Class + TypeScript Tools

tasks.title: Create plugin/includes/Api/Voxel.php
tasks.description: Implement Voxel API controller with 7 REST endpoints following Lms.php pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: detect endpoint uses class_exists + option reading
steps: 1. Read plugin/includes/Api/Lms.php to understand BaseController pattern
2. Create Voxel.php with detect endpoint (class_exists, version option, Elementor check)
3. Add post-types endpoint (proxy to Voxel REST, enrich with field/taxonomy counts)
4. Add single post-type endpoint with full field structure
5. Add taxonomies endpoint with term counts
6. Add product-types endpoint with pricing models
7. Add settings endpoint
8. Add health endpoint (REST reachable, tables exist, memory hint)

tasks.title: Create mcp-server/src/tools/voxel.ts
tasks.description: Implement TypeScript tool definitions for all 7 Voxel endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Proper TypeScript types for response data (VoxelPostType, VoxelTaxonomy, etc.)
Free tier governance (no governance for read-only tools)
Consistent with lms.ts tool definition patterns
steps: 1. Read mcp-server/src/tools/lms.ts to understand tool definition pattern
2. Define TypeScript interfaces: VoxelDetection, VoxelPostType, VoxelTaxonomy, VoxelProductType, VoxelSettings, VoxelHealth
3. Implement detect_voxel tool
4. Implement list_voxel_post_types tool
5. Implement get_voxel_post_type tool (with type param)
6. Implement list_voxel_taxonomies tool
7. Implement get_voxel_product_types tool
8. Implement get_voxel_settings tool
9. Implement voxel_health_check tool

strands.completion_contract: PHP-001 + TS-001 both pass verification independently

strands.name: Registration + Tests

tasks.title: Register Voxel tools in product-tiers.ts and Router.php
tasks.description: Register all 7 Voxel tools in Free tier and wire up Router.php route registration.
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 Voxel tools registered in Free tier
steps: 1. Add Voxel tools to Free tier list in product-tiers.ts
2. Add Voxel controller to Router.php route registration

tasks.title: Write PHP and TypeScript tests for Voxel adapter
tasks.description: Write unit tests covering all 7 endpoints and tool definitions.
acceptanceCriteria: PHP tests cover all 6+ REST endpoints
TypeScript tests verify tool definitions and parameters
steps: 1. Write PHP unit tests following existing test patterns
2. Write TypeScript tests following existing test patterns
3. Run composer test
4. Run npm test

strands.completion_contract: REG-001 passes verification first, then TEST-001 depends on all prior tasks

batch_plan.review_gate: PHP syntax OK + TypeScript compiles + endpoint structure matches LMS pattern
batch_plan.completion_contract: Both lane-1a and lane-1b pass their acceptance criteria
batch_plan.fallback_if_fail: fix failing lane, do not advance

batch_plan.review_gate: All tests pass, all 7 tools registered
batch_plan.completion_contract: Tests pass, Voxel tools appear in list_tools
batch_plan.fallback_if_fail: fix failing tests or registration, retry batch

successCriteria: PHP Voxel.php class with 6+ working endpoints
All tools registered in Free tier
postCompletion: Run npm test && composer test for full regression
Label PRD tasks as completed in prd.json
Verify against a live Voxel WordPress site if available
